thing-type.label: ZEN35 Dimmer Scene Controller
thing-type.description:
Dimmer Scene Controller

Overview

Features

  • Switch button: click for on/off control, hold to dim, tap for scenes
  • 4 remote control buttons: trigger scenes and control other devices in your Z-Wave® network from this switch
  • NEW 800 series Z-Wave® chip for better range and faster control
  • Direct 3-Way: works with regular on/off switches in a 3-way
  • Z-Wave® Long Range for ultra reliable no-mesh communication
  • Smart bulb mode: disable relay and control lights via Z-Wave®
  • Adjustable LED indicator in 7 colors and 3 brightness levels
  • S2 Security and SmartStart for easier inclusion

Specifications

  • Model Number: ZEN35
  • Z-Wave Frequency: 908.42 MHz (US/CA/MX)
  • Power: 120 VAC, 60 Hz
  • Maximum Loads: 150W LED or 500W Incandescent. To be used with LED or incandescent lights only; DON’T use with receptacles, motors, fans, or tube lights.
  • Z-Wave Range: Up to 500 feet line of sight or up to 1300 feet via Z-Wave Long Range
  • Operating Temperature: 32-104° F (0-40° C)
  • Installation: Indoor use only

Inclusion Information

  • Start Z-Wave inclusion.
  • Quickly press the switch button 3 times.

The LED indicator will blink blue to signal communications and turn green for 3 seconds if inclusion is successful or turn red for 3 seconds if the pairing attempt fails.


Exclusion Information

  • Start Z-Wave exclusion.
  • Quickly press the switch button 3 times.

If successful, the LED will turn green for 3 seconds.


Wakeup Information

parameter.name: config_1_1
parameter.label: 1: LED Mode for Dimmer Button
parameter.description:
Choose if you want the LED indicator to turn on when the dimmer (light) is on or off, or if you want it to remain on or off at all times.

Overview

options.option: LED on when dimmer off, LED off when dimmer on
LED on when dimmer on, LED off when dimmer off

parameter.name: config_2_1
parameter.label: 2: LED Mode for Button 1
parameter.description:
Choose if you want the LED indicator to turn on when Button 1 is on or off, or if you want it to remain on or off at all times.

Overview

0 - LED on when dimmer off, LED off when dimmer on (default)

1 - LED on when dimmer on, LED off when dimmer off

2 - LED always off

3 - LED always on

options.option: LED on when dimmer off, LED off when dimmer on
LED on when dimmer on, LED off when dimmer off

parameter.name: config_3_1
parameter.label: 3: LED Mode for Button 2
parameter.description:
Choose if you want the LED indicator to turn on when Button 2 is on or off, or if you want it to remain on or off at all times.

Overview

0 - LED on when dimmer off, LED off when dimmer on (default)

1 - LED on when dimmer on, LED off when dimmer off

2 - LED always off

3 - LED always on

options.option: LED on when dimmer off, LED off when dimmer on
LED on when dimmer on, LED off when dimmer off

parameter.name: config_4_1
parameter.label: 4: LED Mode for Button 3
parameter.description:
Choose if you want the LED indicator to turn on when Button 3 is on or off, or if you want it to remain on or off at all times.

Overview

0 - LED on when dimmer off, LED off when dimmer on (default)

1 - LED on when dimmer on, LED off when dimmer off

2 - LED always off

3 - LED always on

options.option: LED on when dimmer off, LED off when dimmer on
LED on when dimmer on, LED off when dimmer off

parameter.name: config_5_1
parameter.label: 5: LED Mode for Button 4
parameter.description:
Choose if you want the LED indicator to turn on when Button 4 is on or off, or if you want it to remain on or off at all times.

Overview

options.option: LED on when dimmer off, LED off when dimmer on
LED on when dimmer on, LED off when dimmer off

parameter.name: config_6_1
parameter.label: 6: LED Color for Dimmer Button
parameter.description:
Choose the color of the dimmer button LED. 0 - white, 1 - blue, 2 - green, 3 - red, 4 - magenta, 5 - yellow, 6 - cyan

Overview

parameter.name: config_7_1
parameter.label: 7: LED Color for Button 1
parameter.description:
Choose the color of Button 1 LED. 0 - white, 1 - blue, 2 - green, 3 - red, 4 - magenta, 5 - yellow, 6 - cyan

Overview

parameter.name: config_8_1
parameter.label: 8: LED Color for Button 2
parameter.description:
Choose the color of Button 2 LED. 0 - white, 1 - blue, 2 - green, 3 - red, 4 - magenta, 5 - yellow, 6 - cyan

Overview

parameter.name: config_9_1
parameter.label: 9: LED Color for Button 3
parameter.description:
Choose the color of Button 3 LED. 0 - white, 1 - blue, 2 - green, 3 - red, 4 - magenta, 5 - yellow, 6 - cyan

Overview

parameter.name: config_10_1
parameter.label: 10: LED Color for Button 4
parameter.description:
Choose the color of Button 4 LED. 0 - white, 1 - blue, 2 - green, 3 - red, 4 - magenta, 5 - yellow, 6 - cyan

Overview

parameter.name: config_11_1
parameter.label: 11: LED Brightness for Dimmer Button
parameter.description:
Choose the dimmer button LED indicator's brightness level. 0 - bright (100%), 1 - medium (60%), 2 - low (30%)

Overview

parameter.name: config_12_1
parameter.label: 12: LED Brightness for Button 1
parameter.description:
Choose Button 1 LED indicator's brightness level. 0 - bright (100%), 1 - medium (60%), 2 - low (30%)

Overview

parameter.name: config_13_1
parameter.label: 13: LED Brightness for Button 2
parameter.description:
Choose Button 2 LED indicator's brightness level. 0 - bright (100%), 1 - medium (60%), 2 - low (30%)

Overview

parameter.name: config_14_1
parameter.label: 14: LED Brightness for Button 3
parameter.description:
Choose Button 3 LED indicator's brightness level. 0 - bright (100%), 1 - medium (60%), 2 - low (30%)

Overview

parameter.name: config_15_1
parameter.label: 15: LED Brightness for Button 4
parameter.description:
Choose Button 4 LED indicator's brightness level. 0 - bright (100%), 1 - medium (60%), 2 - low (30%)

Overview

parameter.name: config_16_4
parameter.label: 16: Auto Turn-Off Timer for Dimmer
parameter.description: Auto-off timer will automatically turn the dimmer off after X minutes once it has been turned on 0 = disabled

parameter.name: config_17_4
parameter.label: 17: Auto Turn-On Timer for Dimmer
parameter.description: Auto-on timer will automatically turn the dimmer on after X minutes once it has been turned off 0 = disabled

parameter.name: config_18_1
parameter.label: 18: On/Off Status after Power Failure
parameter.description:
Set the on/off status for the dimmer after power failure

Overview

parameter.name: config_19_1
parameter.label: 19: Load Control (Smart Bulb Mode)
parameter.description:
Enable or disable physical and Z-Wave on/off and dimming control. Disable both for smart bulbs.

Overview

parameter.name: config_20_1
parameter.label: 20: Disabled Load Behavior
parameter.description:
Set reporting behavior for disabled physical control of the load connected to the dimmer (smart bulb mode)

Overview

parameter.name: config_21_1
parameter.label: 21: Physical Ramp Rate ON
parameter.description:
Adjust the ramp rate ON for your dimmer when the dimmer button is pressed for a smooth fade-in effect (in seconds).

Overview

parameter.name: config_22_1
parameter.label: 22: Physical Ramp Rate OFF
parameter.description:
Adjust the ramp rate OFF for your dimmer when the dimmer button is pressed for a smooth fade-out effect (in seconds).

Overview

parameter.name: config_23_1
parameter.label: 23: Physical Dimming Speed
parameter.description:
Set the number of seconds it takes to get from 0% to 100% brightness when pressing and holding the button (physical dimming).

Overview

parameter.name: config_24_1
parameter.label: 24: Z-Wave Ramp Rate ON
parameter.description:
Adjust the ramp rate ON for your dimmer when controlled with Z-Wave for a smooth fade-in effect (in seconds).

Overview

0 - instant ON

1 - 99 (seconds)

255 (match physical)

parameter.name: config_25_1
parameter.label: 25: Z-Wave Ramp Rate OFF
parameter.description:
Adjust the ramp rate OFF for your dimmer when controlled with Z-Wave for a smooth fade-out effect (in seconds).

Overview

0 - instant ON

1 - 99 (seconds)

255 (match physical)

parameter.name: config_26_1
parameter.label: 26: Remote Z-Wave Dimming Duration
parameter.description:
Sets the number of seconds it takes to get from 0% to 100% brightness on dimmers and smart bulbs directly associated with ZEN35 in Groups 3 and 4.

Overview

parameter.name: config_27_1
parameter.label: 27: Minimum Brightness
parameter.description: Set the minimum brightness level (in %) for the dimmer. You won't be able to dim the light below this value.

parameter.name: config_28_1
parameter.label: 28: Maximum Brightness
parameter.description: Set the maximum brightness level (in %) for the dimmer. You won't be able to brighten the light above this value.

parameter.name: config_29_1
parameter.label: 29: Dimmer Button Double Tap
parameter.description:
Choose what you'd like the dimmer to do when you double-tap the dimmer button.

Overview

options.option: on to the custom brightness (from param 31)

parameter.name: config_30_1
parameter.label: 30: Dimmer Button Single Tap
parameter.description: Choose what you'd like the dimmer to do when you tap the dimmer button once.

options.option: on to the custom brightness (from param 31)

parameter.name: config_31_1
parameter.label: 31: Physical Custom Brightness On
parameter.description:
Set the custom brightness level (or leave the last brightness level) for single tap and double tap (see params 29 and 30).

Overview

0 - last brightness level

1 - 99 (%)

parameter.name: config_32_1
parameter.label: 32: 3-Way Switch Type
parameter.description:
Choose the type of 3-way switch you want to use with this dimmer in a 3-way setup.

Overview

parameter.name: config_33_1
parameter.label: 33: Multilevel Dimming Reports
parameter.description:
Choose how you would like the dimmer to report when the dimmer button is tapped and held and physical / Z-Wave control is enabled or disabled.

Overview

0 - Reports each brightness level if physical and Z-Wave control disabled (reports final level if physical and Z-Wave control enabled)

1 - Always reports final brightness level only (Z-Wave multilevel reports, physical basic reports)

2 - Reports each brightness level if physical and Z-Wave control disabled (reports final level if physical and Z-Wave control enabled), all multilevel reports

options.option: Reports each brightness level if physical and Z-Wave control disabled
Always reports final brightness level only (Z-Wave multilevel reports,
Reports each brightness level if physical and Z-Wave control disabled

parameter.name: config_34_1
parameter.label: 34: Disable Button Programming
parameter.description:
Disabled programming functionality (inclusion, exclusion, smart bulb mode) so that tripple tap can be used for scenes.

Overview

0- Programming (Inclusion, Exclusion) enabled

1 - Programming Disabled (triple tap available)

parameter.name: config_35_1
parameter.label: 35: Association Reports
parameter.description:
Choose physical and Z-Wave triggers for the dimmer to send a status change report to the associated devices. See manual for details.

Overview

0 - None

1 - Physical tap on button

2 - Physical tap on connected 3-way switch

3 - 1 or 2

4 - Z-Wave command from hub

5 - 1 and 4

6 - 2 and 4

7 - 1 and 2 and 4

8 - Timer

9 - 1 or 8

10 - 2 or 8

11 - 1 or 2 or 8

12 - 4 or 8

13 - 1 or 4 or 8

14 - 2 or 4 or 8

15 - All of the above

parameter.name: config_36_1
parameter.label: 36: Dimmer Button Scene Control
parameter.description: Enable or disable scene control functionality on the dimmer for quick multi tap triggers

parameter.name: config_37_1
parameter.label: 37: Scene Control from 3-Way Switch
parameter.description: Enable scene control from a momentary switch connected to the ZEN35 in a 3-way installation.

options.option: Scene control commands disabled from remote 3-way switch
Scene control commands enabled from remote 3-way switch

parameter.name: config_38_1
parameter.label: 38: Disable LED Flash On Setting Change
parameter.description: Choose if the LED should flash whenever a parameter is adjusted on the device to confirm the change.

options.option: LED flashes to confirm setting change
LED doesn't flash to confirm setting change

parameter.name: config_39_1
parameter.label: 39: Disable LED Flash on Button Press
parameter.description: Choose if the LED should flash whenever the corresponding button is pressed.

options.option: LED flashes when button is pressed
LED doesn't flash when button is pressed

parameter.name: config_40_1
parameter.label: 40: On/Off Switch Mode
parameter.description: Convert the dimmer to an on/off switch. When enabled, the dimmer will behave as a switch without the ability to dim.

parameter.name: config_41_1
parameter.label: 41: Basic Set Custom Brightness ON
parameter.description:
Set custom brightness or leave last brightness for Basic Set ON commands when the ZEN35 is triggered by another device in direct association.

Overview

0 - Last brightness level

1 - 99 (%)

parameter.name: group_1
parameter.label: 1: Lifeline
parameter.description:
Lifeline

Overview

Main button binary switch (Z-Wave) / basic set (button) lifeline to hub

parameter.name: group_2
parameter.label: 2: Basic Set (dimmer)
parameter.description:
Basic Set

Overview

Main dimmer button basic set (pressed only, doesn’t send anything when switch turned on via hub)

parameter.name: group_3
parameter.label: 3: Multilevel (dimmer)
parameter.description:
Multilevel

Overview

Main dimmer button multilevel (held)

parameter.name: group_4
parameter.label: 4: Multilevel Start/Stop
parameter.description: Multilevel Start/Stop

parameter.name: group_5
parameter.label: 5: Basic Set (#1)
parameter.description:
Basic Set

Overview

Small button #1 basic set (pressed)

parameter.name: group_6
parameter.label: 6: Multilevel (#1)
parameter.description:
Multilevel

Overview

Small button #1 multilevel (held) > in sequence > held = increase brightness, release = stop level, held = decrease brightness, release = stop level

parameter.name: group_7
parameter.label: 7: Basic Set (#2)
parameter.description:
Basic Set

Overview

Small button #2 basic set (pressed)

parameter.name: group_8
parameter.label: 8: Multilevel (#2)
parameter.description:
Multilevel

Overview

Small button #2 multilevel (held) > in sequence > held = increase brightness, release = stop level, held = decrease brightness, release = stop level

parameter.name: group_9
parameter.label: 9: Basic Set (#3)
parameter.description:
Basic Set

Overview

Small button #3 basic set (pressed)

parameter.name: group_10
parameter.label: 10: Multilevel (#3)
parameter.description:
Multilevel

Overview

Small button #3 multilevel (held) > in sequence > held = increase brightness, release = stop level, held = decrease brightness, release = stop level

parameter.name: group_11
parameter.label: 11: Basic Set (#4)
parameter.description:
Basic Set

Overview

Small button #4 basic set (pressed)

parameter.name: group_12
parameter.label: 12: Multilevel (#4)
parameter.description:
Multilevel

Overview

Small button #4 multilevel (held) > in sequence > held = increase brightness, release = stop level, held = decrease brightness, release = stop level

channel-type.label: LED Mode for Dimmer Button
channel-type.description: Choose if you want the LED indicator to turn on when the dimmer (light) is on or off, or if you want it to remain on or off at all times.

options.option: LED on when dimmer off, LED off when dimmer on
LED on when dimmer on, LED off when dimmer off

channel-type.label: LED Mode for Button 1
channel-type.description: Choose if you want the LED indicator to turn on when Button 1 is on or off, or if you want it to remain on or off at all times.

options.option: LED on when dimmer off, LED off when dimmer on
LED on when dimmer on, LED off when dimmer off

channel-type.label: LED Mode for Button 2
channel-type.description: Choose if you want the LED indicator to turn on when Button 2 is on or off, or if you want it to remain on or off at all times.

options.option: LED on when dimmer off, LED off when dimmer on
LED on when dimmer on, LED off when dimmer off

channel-type.label: LED Mode for Button 3
channel-type.description: Choose if you want the LED indicator to turn on when Button 3 is on or off, or if you want it to remain on or off at all times.

options.option: LED on when dimmer off, LED off when dimmer on
LED on when dimmer on, LED off when dimmer off

channel-type.label: LED Mode for Button 4
channel-type.description: Choose if you want the LED indicator to turn on when Button 4 is on or off, or if you want it to remain on or off at all times.

options.option: LED on when dimmer off, LED off when dimmer on
LED on when dimmer on, LED off when dimmer off

channel-type.label: LED Color for Dimmer Button
channel-type.description: Choose the color of the dimmer button LED. 0 - white, 1 - blue, 2 - green, 3 - red, 4 - magenta, 5 - yellow, 6 - cyan

channel-type.label: LED Color for Button 1
channel-type.description: Choose the color of Button 1 LED. 0 - white, 1 - blue, 2 - green, 3 - red, 4 - magenta, 5 - yellow, 6 - cyan

channel-type.label: LED Color for Button 2
channel-type.description: Choose the color of Button 2 LED. 0 - white, 1 - blue, 2 - green, 3 - red, 4 - magenta, 5 - yellow, 6 - cyan

channel-type.label: LED Color for Button 3
channel-type.description: Choose the color of Button 3 LED. 0 - white, 1 - blue, 2 - green, 3 - red, 4 - magenta, 5 - yellow, 6 - cyan

channel-type.label: LED Color for Button 4
channel-type.description: Choose the color of Button 4 LED. 0 - white, 1 - blue, 2 - green, 3 - red, 4 - magenta, 5 - yellow, 6 - cyan
